title: Week of Mar 16-22, 2026
summary: New AI Usage dashboard for tracking token consumption and costs across all agents and machines.

features.title: AI Usage Dashboard
features.summary: New /ai-usage page with burn rates, daily cost charts, per-agent and per-machine breakdowns, and session history
features.description:
A comprehensive AI usage tracking dashboard that visualizes token consumption and costs across all Claude agents and machines.

The page features real-time burn rate cards (1h, 6h, 24h windows), a daily cost bar chart with interactive/programmatic split, cost breakdowns by agent persona and machine, a daily summary table, and a detailed session list with duration, model, token counts, and subagent usage.

Data refreshes automatically every 60 seconds (skipping when tab is backgrounded). Period selector supports 7, 14, and 30-day windows.
